content: Operator's standard for guardrail skills that prevent failure modes (cruisinginthewake): (1) BLOCK violations at the pre-commit hook, not warn. (2) Identify current violations with concrete evidence — registry JSON + human-readable triage report. (3) Use sharp/direct tone toward AI agents that get caught. (4) Output references prior offenses by name and md5/sha where applicable. The image-reuse-guardrail skill (.claude/skills/image-reuse-guardrail/SKILL.md) is the reference implementation; scanner at admin/scan-image-reuse.cjs, blocker at admin/check-image-reuse.cjs, hook wired in .githooks/pre-commit.
